decision_commentary: All required fields present: cost_per_sqm (MXN 22,000), base_construction_cost (7,832,000), architecture_fee_pct (12%), architecture_fee (939,840), engineering_allowance (234,960), contingency_pct (10%), total_estimate (9,907,480), assumptions (9 entries). Math verified: 356 × 22,000 = 7,832,000 correct. Architecture fee 12% × 7,832,000 = 939,840 correct. Contingency 10% of (7,832,000 + 939,840 + 234,960) = 900,680. Total = 7,832,000 + 939,840 + 234,960 + 900,680 = 9,907,480 correct. Clearly labeled PRELIMINARY ESTIMATE in first assumption. Assumptions include coastal site premium justification (MXN 22,000 vs MXN 18,000–25,000 range) and note that pool and solar are excluded from base rate. State sync scored 4 — Asana GID 1213707377338790 confirmed in state.json. No auto-fail conditions triggered.
